context.projectOverview: Phase 5 — make self-improvement safe. Sprint 2 builds the replay GATE: a pure compareToBaseline comparator + a `bober replay run` verb that re-derives each frozen case's verdict deterministically (NOT by re-running any LLM), diffs vs baseline, prints a per-case delta table, and exits non-zero on any regression. Exposes runReplayHarness(projectRoot, config) for Sprint 4's evolve verb to import as its promotion gate.

completedSprints.title: Replay store + selfImprove config + replay capture|list|show
completedSprints.summary: ffd6e8a — ReplayStore (putCase/getCase/listCases/getBaselineVerdict/close, :memory:-testable, content-hash caseId), ReplayCaseRecord (eval_details_json/diff_digest/baseline_verdict), off-by-default selfImprove config (replayDir default '.bober/replay'), replay.ts CLI (capture|list|show, no-throw + process.exitCode). Sprint 2 EXTENDS replay.ts with `run` and ADDS replay-harness.ts.

relevantFiles: src/orchestrator/selfimprove/replay-store.ts (Sprint 1 — load cases via listCases(); ReplayCaseRecord shape)
src/orchestrator/memory/distill.ts (pure, fs-free, clock-free exemplar for compareToBaseline)
src/cli/commands/replay.ts (Sprint 1 — extend with `run`; no-throw + process.exitCode=1 pattern)
src/config/schema.ts + src/config/loader.ts (read config.selfImprove.replayDir; tolerate missing section)
